Services & Pricing

Everything your dog needs

Transparent pricing. First solo walk always free.

🐕‍🦺⭐ Most Popular

Group Walk

Social adventures in small groups of up to 4 dogs. Great energy, great friends.

$18 – $22
per walk · max 4 dogs
🏠

Home Boarding

A real home — not a kennel. Cozy bed, yard access, and constant love while you're away.

$55 – $75
per night · kennel-free
🌙

Dog Sitting

Full-day or weekend sitting with daily photo and video updates throughout.

$45 – $60
per day
🐶

Puppy Check-In

Short drop-in visits for puppies needing potty breaks, feeding, and playtime.

$20 – $25
per visit · 20–30 min
🚗

Drop-In Visit

A quick check-in for feeding, a short walk, and midday TLC.

$20 – $28
per visit · flexible

About JoJo

A dog lover through
& through

Hi, I'm JoJo — a certified dog walker and home boarding specialist based in North York. Every walk is personal, every boarding stay is in my own home. No strangers, no kennels — just genuine care.

✅  Licensed & Professionally Certified
🛡️  Fully Insured & Bonded
📸  Real-time photo & video updates
🎉  First walk always FREE
